textByHash.18a28f1bcbf087c51340805ac49f83face190388: [laugh][laugh], human is funny! You will barely fill my stomach, stop wasting my time!
textByHash.28059d67e1e7a26682105bebb003ae13f9cdc0d5: [laugh][laugh]! Monkeys offer us treasure, land and all the humans we can eat! What do you offer us?
textByHash.6e5154f759ccbf2c35374c96a0e3c77fb2547f2c: Little human is brave! I think I can offer you a deal...
textByHash.813877c1b0b86049dd83d49686c354723c3c2053: You found him! What do you want, little human?
textByHash.92a4a11d74040cd528c52c51da7c6dcc841932a1: I don't think human can offer me cities like the monkey king can!
textByHash.933e602f756caca0d9521fdb26b5644c3dda8758: Stop! Stop! You prove you are very strong, little human!
textByHash.a2d999a057f0069c4060f847f757b6e01decc828: You prove you are very strong, little human!
textByHash.b56f2dcf8e332632680dacdfe1591eb8b355eff2: A deal is a deal. We will not be allies with the monkeys.
textByHash.fba87d2decc9156a56461e40b8471ef52849eadc: If you can defeat me in battle, I will tell my men not to help the monkeys.
